igbo.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Maka oge PM mgbe ehihie gasịrị, wepụ 12 na awa.
igbo.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: Maka oge AM, awa na-anọgide otu.
igbo.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Kwaga otu ngosipụta ma lelee ka analog, oge 12-hour na 24-hour si anọgide jikọtara ọnụ.
igbo.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Kewaa interval ka ọ bụrụ jumps dị mfe ruo awa zuru oke, wee jikọta jumps.
igbo.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Interval bụ efu, ya mere mmalite na njedebe bụ otu.
igbo.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Jiri 12-hour ụdị nwere AM ma ọ bụ PM.
igbo.enter_a_time_such_as_13_25_or_1_25_pm: Tinye oge, dị ka 13:25 ma ọ bụ 1:25 PM.
igbo.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Tinye nkeji ma ọ bụ duration, dị ka awa 1 nkeji 15.
igbo.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Ọ ka erubeghị. Sepụta jumps n'etiti oge abụọ ma nwaa ọzọ.
igbo.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Tụnyere ogologo events, free-time gaps, na obosara nkeụzọ zuru oke.
igbo.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Mara oge abụọ akara na number line. Wụlie ruo awa zuru oke dị mfe, tinye awa zuru oke, wee jiri nkeji fọdụrụ mechaa.
igbo.enter_a_time_such_as_18_40_or_6_40_pm: Tinye oge, dị ka 18:40 ma ọ bụ 6:40 PM.
igbo.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Tinye nkeji ma ọ bụ duration, dị ka awa 2 nkeji 15.
igbo.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Ọ ka erubeghị. Jiri elekere, timeline, ma ọ bụ nkeji ka etiti abalị gasịrị.
igbo.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Retry set zuru oke. Na-alaghachi na challenges niile.
igbo.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Practice set kwụsiri ike ma nwee nkwenye nke nwere difficulty bands na queue lekwasịrị anya n'ime nke efunahụrụ ọzọ.
igbo.solved_currently_viewing_challenge: edoziri; challenge a na-ele ugbu a
igbo.example_95_min_or_1_h_35_m: Ọmụmaatụ: nkeji 95 ma ọ bụ awa 1 nkeji 35
igbo.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Enwere ike itinye durations na mkpokọta nkeji ma ọ bụ n'awa na nkeji.
igbo.include_am_or_pm: Tinye AM ma ọ bụ PM.
igbo.you_may_use_either_12_hour_or_24_hour_: Ị nwere ike iji 12-hour ma ọ bụ 24-hour ụdị.
igbo.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Sepụta jumps ruo awa zuru oke dị mfe.
igbo.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Gbanwee oge ọ bụla ka ọ bụrụ nkeji ka etiti abalị gasịrị.
igbo.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Maka mmalite na-efu, gụọ azụ site na njedebe.
igbo.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Ịgafe etiti abalị na-amalite 24-hour cycle ọhụrụ.
igbo.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Hụ oge, gụọ oge, hazie oge, ma kọwaa strategy gị.
igbo.time_and_schedule_lab_sections: Akụkụ nke Time and Schedule Lab
igbo.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Oge elekere na ọnụọgụ oge bụ ihe dị iche iche. Dee units na durations.
igbo.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Enweghị timer pressure · keyboard friendly · nwere text alternatives
